popularStory.headline: Fair maiden of kent
popularStory.description: Princess Joan, suo jure 4th Countess of Kent and 5th Baroness Wake of Liddell (29 September 1328 – 7 August 1385), known to history as The Fair Maid of Kent, was the first post-conquest Princess of Wa …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan of Kent於1326年9月29日出生在英國奧可福爾武德斯托可時，她的父親Edmund of Woodstock 1st Earl of Kent25歲，母親Margaret Wake27歲。她於1340年與Sir Thomas Holand在英國肯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1385年8月7日在英國波克夏瓦林福德享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯坦福。

nameMeanings.name: Kent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from the county of Kent. The surname is also established in Ireland, where English bearers of this name settled in Meath, in the 13th century. The name has been Gaelicized as Ceannt.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan of Kent was born on 29 September 1326, in Woodstock, Oxfordshire, England, her father, Edmund of Woodstock 1st Earl of Kent, was 25 and her mother, Margaret Wake, was 27. She married Sir Thomas Holand in 1340, in Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 7 August 1385, in Wallingford, Berkshire, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan of Kent est née le 29 septembre 1326, à Woodstock, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Edmund of Woodstock 1st Earl of Kent, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret Wake, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Holand en 1340, à Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 7 août 1385, à Wallingford, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan of Kent am 29. September 1326 in Woodstock, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edmund of Woodstock 1st Earl of Kent 25 und ihre Mutter Margaret Wake 27. Sie hat 1340 in Kent, England Sir Thomas Holand geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 7. August 1385 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Wallingford, Berkshire, England und wurde in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan of Kent è nata il il 29 settembre 1326 nel Woodstock, Oxfordshire, England, sua padre, Edmund of Woodstock 1st Earl of Kent, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Margaret Wake, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Holand nel 1340, nel Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 7 agosto 1385, nel Wallingford, Berkshire, England, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan of Kentが1326年9月29日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアウッドストックで生まれた時，父Edmund of Woodstock 1st Earl of Kentは25歳，母Margaret Wakeは27歳であった。1340年にイギリスケントでSir Thomas Holandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1385年8月7日にイギリスバークシュアイアワリングフォードで58歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan of Kent(이)가 1326년 9월 29일 영국 스퍼드실르 우드스톡에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund of Woodstock 1st Earl of Kent(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Wake(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1340년 영국 켄트에서 Sir Thomas Holand(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1385년 8월 7일 영국 버크실르 월링퍼드에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스타퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Lond: Palace of Westminster, Westminster, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan of Kent nasceu em 29 de setembro de 1326, em Woodstock, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmund of Woodstock 1st Earl of Kent, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Wake, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Holand em 1340, em Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 7 de agosto de 1385, em Wallingford, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Lond: палеис оф вестминстир, вестминстир, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan of Kent родилась 29 сентября 1326 г. в местности вудстокк, оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Edmund of Woodstock 1st Earl of Kent было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Wake, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Holand в 1340 г. в местности кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 7 августа 1385 г. в местности валлингфорд, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan of Kent nació el 29 de septiembre de 1326, en Woodstock, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Edmund of Woodstock 1st Earl of Kent, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margaret Wake, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Holand en 1340, en Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 7 de agosto de 1385, en Wallingford, Berkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
